director.tagline_zh: 遊戲廣告 × 商業影像導演，紮根台灣
director.tagline_en: Game Ad & Commercial Film Director — Based in Taiwan
director.bio_zh: 鄭又勛（York）是台灣的遊戲廣告與商業影像導演，同時是曜境影像製作工作室創辦人。9 年來執導超過 88 個案子、產出逾 1000 支影音交付物，客戶橫跨 Schick舒適牌、王品集團、GODIVA、Google Play、茶裏王等消費品牌，以及斗羅大陸、天龍八部2、新仙俠：起源、失落的方舟等國際知名遊戲 IP。作品類型橫跨真人實拍、CG特效到AI生成影像等多元技術路線，從創意腳本、拍攝執行到後期製作皆一手包辦。
director.bio_en: York Cheng is a Taiwan-based director specializing in game advertising and commercial film, and the founder of Yao Jing Image Production Studio (registered in Taiwan). Over 9 years, he has directed 88+ projects and delivered 1,000+ final video assets for clients spanning consumer brands — Schick, Wang Steak Group, GODIVA, Google Play, and Tea's Tea — alongside internationally recognized game IPs including Soul Land, Tian Long Ba Bu 2, Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, and Lost Ark. His work spans live-action production, CG effects, and AI-generated imagery, with hands-on involvement from creative scripting and production through post.

works.title_zh: 舒適牌 Schick HydroPRO 磁浮刮鬍刀 OTV
works.desc_zh: 為國際刮鬍刀品牌 Schick 執導的電視廣告，完整走過腳本、PPM、定裝到拍攝的商業製作流程。
works.desc_en: A commercial TVC for international razor brand Schick, taken through the full production pipeline from script and PPM to costume fitting and shoot.
works.concept_zh: 這是一支沒有主角臉孔的廣告——刀身在純黑舞台上懸浮、旋轉，像一件供在暗室裡的工業雕塑。磁浮科技被翻譯成光與水兩種物理：水絲沖刷刀刃紋理，一圈藍色光環在貼頰的瞬間亮起，刀鋒劃過皮膚留下一道發光軌跡。人只出現兩次，且都不是主角——一次刮鬍的動作、一次未完全展開的笑——其餘時間，懸浮與光都在替產品說話。
works.concept_en: An advertisement with no lead face — the blade hovers and turns on a black stage like an industrial object enshrined in the dark. Magnetic levitation is translated into two physics: water threading across the cartridge's grain, a ring of blue light igniting the instant the blade meets a cheek, its path left glowing on skin. The human figure appears twice, and neither time as the star — a shaving gesture, an unfinished smile — everywhere else, the float and the light do the talking.

works.desc_zh: 為知名飲料品牌茶裏王執導《客棧圍攻篇》，官方頻道累積近 200 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed "Inn Siege," a spot for popular tea brand Tea's Tea that has drawn nearly 2 million views on its official channel.
works.concept_zh: 武俠圍攻的語彙被原封不動地借來，只為了在最後一刻抽掉刀——環繞構圖、逼近特寫、一句「插翅也難飛」，把桌邊的主角圍成一場即將開打的戲。反派沒有拔刀，他舉起瓶子喝了一大口：「夠嗎」這句問句原本指向打鬥，答案卻落在茶量上。殺氣被一個喝水的動作卸得乾乾淨淨，圍攻最終只是一群人湊桌喝茶。
works.concept_en: The vocabulary of a wuxia ambush is borrowed whole, only to have the blade pulled at the last second — encircling blocking, tight close-ups, a line like "there's no escaping today," closing a crowd around the man at the table as if a fight is seconds away. The antagonist never draws a weapon; he lifts a bottle and drinks. "Is that enough?" is asked as a threat and answered as a quantity. One gesture — swallowing tea — disarms the whole scene, and the siege turns out to be a gathering.

works.title_zh: Google Play 台灣廣告《就差一點》
works.desc_zh: 為 Google Play 台灣執導的品牌廣告《就差一點》，官方頻道累積超過 42 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the Google Play Taiwan brand campaign "So Close," which has drawn over 420K views on the official YouTube channel.
works.concept_zh: 焦慮被拆成三種鏡頭語言反覆練習——貼著螢幕的第一人稱手指、圍在手機旁的真實表情、完全跳出手機畫面的遊戲特效本身。同一份「差一點」的心情橫跨好幾款不同的遊戲被串在一起，靠的不是劇情，是一組無論在哪款遊戲裡都通用的點數系統。兩張素人的臉從人群裡的旁觀反應，一路走到霓虹招牌下的正面喊話，升格的過程本身就是敘事。
works.concept_en: The anxiety is rehearsed through three distinct registers of camera — a thumb pressed close against the screen, real faces huddled around a phone, and finally the game's own effects breaking free of any screen at all. The same feeling of "almost" is stitched across several unrelated games by a single point system that pays out no matter which one is being played. Two ordinary faces rise from anonymous reactions in a crowd to standing under a neon sign addressing the camera directly — the promotion itself is the story.

works.views_note_en: Director's cut from the channel archive
works.desc_zh: 為國際巧克力品牌 GODIVA 執導的品牌影片。
works.desc_en: A brand film directed for international chocolate label GODIVA.
works.concept_zh: 一份禮物被放大成城市尺度的裝置——巧克力串成一件懸在地標塔樓正上方的聖誕吊飾，金色流光劃過夜空只是為了替它揭幕。低多邊形馴鹿與比利時老城的金線剪影負責交代身世，寫實產品攝影負責交代可以被帶走的部分。全片沒有一張人臉，品牌自己的馬車紋章才是唯一出場的角色。
works.concept_en: A gift is scaled up to the size of a city — chocolates threaded into a single ornament suspended directly over a landmark tower, a streak of gold light crossing the night sky only to unveil it. Low-poly reindeer and a gilded silhouette of old Belgian rowhouses carry the lineage; straight product photography carries what can actually be taken home. No human face appears anywhere in the frame — the brand's own horse-and-carriage crest is the only character on screen.

works.views_note: 頻道 Shorts 三部曲(壹/貳/參之型),此為壹之型
works.views_note_en: Part 1 of a three-part Shorts series on the director's channel
works.desc_zh: 為王品集團新餐飲品牌「肉次方」執導的品牌廣告。
works.desc_en: A brand commercial directed for Wang Steak Group's new dining concept, Rou Ci Fang.
works.concept_zh: 一整塊牛肉被供在紅光武館長廊的正中央，像一件需要被朝拜的聖物，隨後才展開真正的招式——師徒過招、雷電纏身、紅霧字卡報出「型」的段落名。刀刃劃開油花的超微距鏡頭是全片唯一「真實」的質感，它不斷插入，像副歌一樣打斷每一段武打，把肉質軟嫩翻譯成一門需要修煉的心法。兩人四目相對時滿版愛心飄散，把武俠的肅殺感和吃到飽的日常感揉在同一個鏡頭裡。
works.concept_en: A whole cut of marbled beef is enshrined at the center of a red-lit dojo corridor, presented like a relic to be venerated, before the choreography actually begins — master and disciple trading blows, lightning wrapped around their bodies, red-mist cards announcing each "form." A hyper-real macro of a blade opening the marbling is the film's only genuine texture, cutting back in again and again like a chorus, translating tenderness into a martial discipline to be mastered. When master and disciple lock eyes mid-fight, hearts scatter across the frame — wuxia's gravity and an all-you-can-eat buffet sharing the same shot.

works.views_note: 原配對誤植為競品版本（林志穎、坤達、鳳小岳三人合演的官方TVC，108萬觀看，非本案）。已依鄭又勛導演作品頻道 cX7d8eiJfz8 說明欄核實：導演鄭又勛／代言人林志穎（僅一人）；查無對應的官方高觀看版本，故觀看數不顯示，available on request
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled a competing version (an official TVC co-starring Jimmy Lin, Kunda, and Rhydian Vaughan, 1.08M views — not this case). Verified via York Cheng's director channel description for cX7d8eiJfz8: director York Cheng, single endorser Jimmy Lin only; no matching high-view official version was found, so the view count is not shown — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為經典武俠 IP《天龍八部2》執導廣告，由林志穎代言（依導演頻道說明欄核實，非坊間流傳的三人版）。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for classic wuxia IP Tian Long Ba Bu 2, featuring endorser Jimmy Lin (verified via the director's own channel description; not the widely-circulated three-endorser cut).
works.concept_zh: 三個排比句把「執念」拆成三重代價，直接砸向觀眾——稱霸與獨行並置，捨愛與江湖並置，結義與凶險並置。段譽走過的每一片雪原、每一叢蘆葦，都是一句詰問句的具體場景，直到三杯血酒在風雪中一飲而盡。答案沒有落在權力或愛情上，落在一句最樸素的字卡——「也永遠兄弟齊心」。
works.concept_en: Three parallel questions break "obsession" into three prices, thrown straight at the viewer — dominance set against solitude, love set against sacrifice, brotherhood set against peril. Every snowfield and reed bed Duan Yu walks through is a rhetorical question made into a location, until three cups of wine are drunk down in the blizzard for fallen comrades. The answer lands not on power or love, but on the plainest line of all — "we are still a unity."

works.title_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.client_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.views_note: 原配對為官方頻道無代言人的通用 PV（l6HfuzRfLO0，36.6萬觀看），與導演頻道實際案件（高燃集結篇/斗羅時空篇，代言人：汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明）不符。已改用官方頻道同代言人陣容版本（終極一班跨時空集結篇，20.8萬觀看），與導演頻道說明欄代言人確認一致
works.views_note_en: The original match was a generic official-channel PV with no endorsers (l6HfuzRfLO0, 366K views), which didn't match the director channel's actual case (endorsers Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming). Replaced with the official-channel version featuring the same endorser lineup (208K views), consistent with the endorsers confirmed in the director channel's description
works.desc_zh: 為知名 IP《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》執導代言廣告，找回終極一班班底汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明重返校園場景，以「宗門集結」的召喚敘事貫穿全片。
works.desc_en: Directed the endorsement campaign for the major game IP Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters, reuniting KO ONE cast members Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming in their old school setting, built around a "Sect Assembly" call-to-arms.
works.concept_zh: 沒有敘舊的空檔——魂獸從背後撲來的那一刻，校園走廊已經是戰場。四位演員各自被一種顏色的特效纏身：紫色雷電、金色光環、火焰羽翼，校園場景和CG武魂被剪進同一顆鏡頭裡即時爆發。一句「這就是終極斗羅」把遊戲裡的階級稱號，直接嫁接進他們多年累積的兄弟身分。
works.concept_en: There's no time for catching up — the moment a soul beast lunges from behind, the school corridor is already a battlefield. Each of the four actors is wrapped in a different color of effect — purple lightning, a gold ring, flaming wings — real hallway and CG martial soul cut into the same shot, erupting at once. One line, "this is the Ultimate Dou Luo," grafts the game's rank straight onto an identity these four have carried together for years.

works.views_note: 越南代理商官方頻道查無公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔（個位數觀看），available on request
works.views_note_en: No public version found on the Vietnamese publisher's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel (single-digit views) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《開天》執導廣告，由林志穎代言，以雲海仙山的意象扣回「開天」的世界觀命題。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Kaitian (Heaven's Gate), featuring endorser Jimmy Lin, framed around a sea-of-clouds mountaintop vision that echoes the game's own origin-myth premise.
works.concept_zh: 一句詰問「若世上萬火盡滅」，牽出三段記憶——床帳裡守著熟睡孩子的手、竹林裡第一次對望的陽光、三人並肩承受一道天雷的瞬間。童年、初戀、結義被剪成同一種鄉愁，直到旁白說出全片真正的關鍵句：「我以此劍，開闢天地」。片名「開天」不再只是一個標題，它是最後一個動作。
works.concept_en: A single question — "what if every fire in the world went out" — pulls up three memories: a hand watching over a sleeping child behind bed curtains, sunlight through bamboo at a first meeting of eyes, three figures bracing together under a bolt of heavenly lightning. Childhood, first love, and brotherhood are cut into the same register of longing, until the voiceover delivers the film's real thesis: "with this sword, I carve open heaven and earth." The title stops being a name and becomes the final action.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：徐若瑄），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Vivian Hsu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《神魔傳說》執導廣告，由徐若瑄代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Shen Mo Chuan Shuo, featuring endorser Vivian Hsu.
works.concept_zh: 代言不是掛在片尾的一張名牌，是一整條角色弧線的終點。一個活了千年的黑袍女子從倖存，到獨自站在屍山之中泫然欲泣，到綠色靈氣纏上全身、妝容轉為妖冶——「那就和我一起成魔」是全片唯一的轉折句，也是她從人變成神祇的瞬間。徐若瑄具名的肖像，就是這個黑化終點本身。
works.concept_en: The endorsement isn't a name card bolted onto the last frame — it's the destination of an entire character arc. A woman who has lived a thousand years goes from survivor, to standing alone in a field of the dead in tears, to green spectral energy wrapping her body as her expression turns ornate and menacing — "then let it transform me into a demon" is the film's only turn, and the moment she stops being human. The portrait credited to Vivian Hsu is that transformation itself.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：林心如），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Ruby Lin) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《超爆三國志》執導廣告，由林心如代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Chao Bao San Guo Zhi, featuring endorser Ruby Lin.
works.concept_zh: 她先以本人的姿態出現，黑色亮片、長髮迎風，下一秒鏡頭已經站在建安十三年的赤壁戰火裡。一隻披甲的手觸碰額頭，像在喚醒一段被遺忘的前世——她既是螢幕外的代言人，也是螢幕裡被喚醒的那個人。「沉寂千年的火鳳」不是一句形容，是身分揭曉的瞬間。
works.concept_en: She first appears as herself — black sequins, hair in the wind — and the very next cut drops her into the fires of Red Cliffs, year thirteen of Jian'an. An armored hand touches a forehead, as if waking a forgotten past life — she is at once the endorser standing outside the screen and the woman being woken inside it. "The fire phoenix that has slept a thousand years" isn't a description; it's the moment identity is revealed.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：吳宗憲），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Jacky Wu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為策略手遊《文明與征服》（官方英文名 Era of Conquest）執導廣告，由吳宗憲代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the strategy mobile game Era of Conquest (文明與征服), featuring endorser Jacky Wu.
works.concept_zh: 沒有借代言人的光環，直接借他插科打諢的本能——一句「我當盟主 有誰不服」撂下去，角鬥士先衝上來，羅馬皇帝連喊三聲「我不服」才輪到他拔劍。畫面疊上一句英文「SHUT UP」，把一場多方對峙的鬧劇壓縮成幾秒鐘的喜劇節奏。遊戲名字被他親口唸出來，像是連台詞都懶得假裝是別人寫的。
works.concept_en: No star wattage borrowed here — just his own instinct for comic timing. "I'm the alliance leader, who refuses to submit" gets thrown down, a gladiator charges in first, and a Roman emperor shouts "I don't submit" three times before he even draws his sword. The screen flashes an English "SHUT UP," compressing a multi-way standoff into a few seconds of pure comic rhythm. He says the game's name himself, on camera, as if the line wasn't even written to sound like anyone else's.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（金庸正版授權手遊，說明欄核實代言人：徐錦江），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (an officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game; endorser confirmed via video description: Elvis Tsui) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為金庸正版授權手遊《新鹿鼎記》執導電視廣告，由徐錦江代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a TVC for the officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game Xin Lu Ding Ji, featuring endorser Elvis Tsui.
works.concept_zh: 招牌反派沒有被顛覆，是被加碼——鰲拜依然跋扈，只是貪的對象從權力換成了美人和角色。建寧公主一句「用你最厲害的那招」點燃他，雙胞胎的「兩個也不夠」把慾望一路推到「我全部都要」。尾卡老實寫上「鰲拜」兩個字，提醒觀眾這張臉從來不需要偽裝成別人。
works.concept_en: The signature villain isn't subverted — he's doubled down on. Oboi is still domineering, just redirected: from political power to beauties and collectible characters. Princess Jianning lights the fuse with "use your most powerful move"; twin sisters push the greed further with "two isn't enough"; it lands on "I want them ALL." The closing card names him plainly — Oboi — a reminder that this face never needed to pretend to be anyone else.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版_完整版（說明欄核實代言人：Selina任家萱、任容萱姊妹），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel, full cut (endorsers confirmed via video description: sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《新仙俠：起源》執導廣告，由 Selina 任家萱與任容萱姊妹代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, featuring sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen.
works.concept_zh: 兩條時間線被縫在同一首歌裡——現代臥房裡蓋被安慰對方的兩個孩子，和古裝世界裡在燭光前梳髮、在洞穴中鄭重交換信物的兩個化身，反覆疊在一起，直到分不清誰是誰的前世。長大後的兩姊妹一個仍穿著古裝，一個已經是現代裝束，並肩站著相視而笑——羈絆不需要翻譯成同一套語言，它本來就橫跨了兩個時空。
works.concept_en: Two timelines are stitched into a single ballad — two children comforting each other under a blanket in a present-day bedroom, and two figures brushing hair by candlelight and solemnly exchanging a token in a cave, layered over and over until it's unclear which is whose past life. Grown, the sisters stand side by side — one still in ancient robes, one in modern dress — smiling at each other. The bond never needed translating into a single language; it was always built to cross two timelines at once.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：陳漢典），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Hank Chen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《斬妖》執導事前預約廣告，由陳漢典代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a pre-registration campaign ad for the mobile game Zhan Yao, featuring endorser Hank Chen.
works.concept_zh: 一把寫著「空虛」的扇子撐起一個自封天下第一的角色，下一秒就被婢女當眾拆穿：「你不是空虛，是腎虛」——整支片的笑點建立在一個諧音的尷尬瞬間上，而不是角色的浮誇本身。同一個哏被延伸成一整首歌：彩色的荒誕喜劇（輪椅、壽宴、打不通的電話）和顆粒感的黑白復古片段交錯，副歌一遍遍唱著「腎虛空虛」，直到片尾揭曉真正的聯動——一個笑點，養出了一整個自嘲的小宇宙。
works.concept_en: A fan reading "Void" props up a character who declares himself number one under heaven, only to be publicly deflated a beat later by a maidservant: "you're not Void, you're Kidney-Deficient" — the entire joke rests on that one homophone, not on the character's swagger. The same gag is stretched into a full song: color-graded absurdist comedy (a wheelchair, a birthday-meets-funeral banquet, a call no one picks up) intercut with grainy black-and-white retro segments, the chorus looping "kidney-void, empty-void" until the ending reveals a genuine crossover. One pun, grown into an entire self-mocking universe.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：李多慧；另有張衛健代言版本，非本支），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Lee Da-hye; a separate cut featured Dicky Cheung, not this one) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《玩賺大都會》執導廣告，由李多慧代言（另有張衛健代言版本）。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Wan Zhuan Da Du Hui, featuring endorser Lee Da-hye (a separate cut featured Dicky Cheung).
works.concept_zh: 三個分身先被平放比較，像商品陳列；下一秒其中一個已經放大成城市天際線上的一整棟大樓看板。看板開始朝現實噴錢，鈔票落下，她從螢幕裡走出來，站在街頭數著手裡的錢——代言人的身分被直接翻譯成一場城市尺度的造星奇觀，誇張到帶著自嘲的意味。
works.concept_en: Three personas are laid out side by side for comparison, like products on a shelf; a beat later, one of them has already blown up into a building-sized billboard on the skyline. The billboard starts raining cash into the real world, and she steps out of the screen entirely, standing in the street counting bills in her hands — the endorsement translated directly into a city-scaled spectacle of instant stardom, broad enough to know it's laughing at itself.

works.views_note: 本篇單支影片 10.2萬觀看；同系列「震撼登場」全 8 支官方影片合計超過 290 萬觀看
works.views_note_en: This single cut has drawn 102K views; the full "Shocking Debut" series of 8 official videos has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views
works.desc_zh: 為國際大作《失落的方舟》（Amazon Games）執導廣告，官方系列影片合計觀看數超過 290 萬。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the major title Lost Ark (Amazon Games); the official campaign series has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views.
works.concept_zh: 沒有一張臉可以依靠，片子只用氛圍說服人。斗篷身影從灰霧中浮現，伸手觸碰一圈血色光暈的瞬間，字卡寫著「體內潛藏著無法抑制的力量」——墮落被拍成一個緩慢而確定的動作，不需要台詞收尾。最後鏡頭俯瞰一片焦土，片名本身變成整支片唯一的、也是最後的一記鉤子。
works.concept_en: There's no face to lean on — the film convinces entirely through mood. A cloaked figure rises out of gray mist, and the instant a hand reaches toward a ring of crimson light, the caption reads "an uncontrollable power lurks within" — the fall is shot as one slow, certain gesture, needing no line to close it. The camera pulls back over a scorched battlefield, and the title itself becomes the film's only hook, delivered last.

_removed_works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled the case as "Dawn"; the director's own channel actually lists Ragnarok Online: The First Fight ("Doctor"/"Professor"/"Lawyer" cuts) with no "Dawn" entry.
